summary: Tested Block 137: Heritage Spectrum & Ultra-Fit for ComposerBar buttons and Report Modal Discord CTA. All features verified working correctly.

heritage_spectrum_desktop.all_5_buttons_visible: PASS - Now Spinning, Haul, ISO, Note, Randomizer all visible

heritage_spectrum_mobile.iso_icon_only: PASS - width=36px, hidden sm:inline class, display:none on mobile
heritage_spectrum_mobile.note_icon_only: PASS - width=36px, hidden sm:inline class, display:none on mobile
heritage_spectrum_mobile.non_scrolling_row: PASS - Single flat row with gap-1.5 and justify-between

report_modal_discord_cta.discord_cta_visible: PASS - Appears at top of modal
report_modal_discord_cta.discord_copy_text: PASS - 'Join the community! Live chat with us about enhancements, upcoming features, bugs, and fixes.'

critical_code_review_comments: ComposerBar spectrum array correctly implements Heritage Spectrum colors
showLabel: false for ISO, Note, Randomizer enables icon-only mobile behavior
CSS classes 'hidden sm:inline' properly hide labels on mobile (<640px)
Button widths: icon-only buttons are w-9 (36px), labeled buttons use flex-1
ReportModal Discord CTA section correctly positioned at top with proper copy
context_for_next_testing_agent: Block 137 Heritage Spectrum and Report Modal Discord CTA fully tested and working. All 5 ComposerBar buttons display correct muted gold tones (#D4AF37, #C5A028, #B69119, #A7820A, #987300). Labels correctly renamed to 'Haul' and 'Note'. On mobile (<640px), ISO/Note/Randomizer are icon-only (w-9=36px) while Now Spinning/Haul keep labels. Report Modal shows Discord CTA at top with correct link and copy text.
